subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-10-20
subcodes.first_line: You are very welcome, very welcome, very welcome! ...And the purpose of being a Baha'i is this, that man should be adorned with all the virtues of the world of humanity.
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @growth of the Cause
